prestazioni: Engine: XU8T (1.9L turbocharged inline-4, 16V, 200 PS stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 1.5-bar boost reliability.

Turbocharger: Garrett GT3076R .63 A/R with TiAL Sport 44mm external wastegate and custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe (T3/T4 flange) paired with a PWR 5-row front-mount intercooler (550hp core) and Samco Sport silicone hoses (blue).

Fuel System: Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump (340 LPH) with Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min), AEM 34002 EMS standalone ECU (PnP for XU8T), and custom 3.5-bar fuel rail with AN-6 fittings.
estetica: Body Kit: Peugeot Sport Works (PSW) Group A homologation-style widebody conversion with carbon fiber front splitter (25mm overhang), rear diffuser (3-piece, 3D Design Japan), and custom aluminum rear wing (adjustable 3-position Gurney flap, 1200mm span).

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +15 ET (front) and 17x10.5 +25 ET (rear) in matte gunmetal, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (235/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear) with custom center-lock adapters (14x1.5 thread).

Interior: Recaro Pole Position II (Kei Miura edition) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, custom aluminum shift knob (Peugeot Sport T16 replica, 150g), and OMP Steering Wheel (330mm, suede) with quick-release hub (NRG Innovations).
